steps.title: Name the real author
steps.content: The student's goal is to identify the real author of Adam Bede. The notes say George Eliot was assumed to be a pseudonym and that Mary Ann Evans later revealed herself as the novel's real author.

steps.title: Reject unnamed answers
steps.content: Choice B explains that George Eliot was probably a pseudonym but does not name the real author. Choice C only repeats the title page name. Choice D says a woman revealed herself as the author but still fails to identify her as Mary Ann Evans. The answer is A.
